aquacroptools 0.2.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Getting Started: Initializing an AquaCrop Project
    • Onset of the Growing Season: Methods, Limitations, and Sahelian Realities
    • Regional Crop Simulations Using aquacroptools

Write AquaCrop Parameter Files for Multiple Years

Source: R/write_prm.R
write_prm.Rd

Creates a single .PRM file with the header written once, followed by one year block per row in planting_schedule.

Climate files (CLI, Tnx, ETo, PLU) and soil files (SOL, SW0) are always required. All other sections are optional: if their path is NULL, "(None)" is written in the PRM file.

write_prm(
  site_name,
  path = "LIST/",
  planting_schedule = NULL,
  crop_name = NULL,
  crop_path = "CROP/",
  crop_duration = 90,
  climate_path = "CLIMATE/",
  calendar_path = NULL,
  management_path = "MANAGEMENT/",
  irrigation_path = "MANAGEMENT/",
  soil_path = "SOIL/",
  groundwater_path = NULL,
  offseason_path = NULL,
  obs_path = NULL,
  simulation_start_doy = NULL,
  scenario = "hist",
  eol = "windows",
  use_standalone = TRUE,
  base_path = getwd()
)

Arguments

site_name

Station identifier.

path

Output directory path for PRM files. Default: "LIST/".

planting_schedule

data.frame with at least two columns:

year

Numeric. Year of cultivation.

planting_doy

Numeric. Day of year for planting (1-365/366).

Optional when calendar_path is provided: the planting schedule is then derived automatically from find_onset(). If both are supplied, calendar_path takes precedence and planting_schedule is ignored with a warning.

crop_name

Crop name (e.g., "maize_90days"). If NULL, section 3 is written as (None). Default: NULL.

crop_path

Path to crop file directory. Default: "CROP/". If crop_name is NULL, crop_path is ignored and section 3 is written as (None).

crop_duration

Growing season length in days. Default: 90.

climate_path

Path to climate file directory. Default: "CLIMATE/".

calendar_path

Path to calendar file directory. Default: NULL. When provided, the planting schedule is derived automatically via find_onset() and planting_schedule can be NULL. Section 2 is always written as (None): the CAL file is used only to compute onset dates, not referenced in the PRM.

management_path

Path to field management file directory. Default: "MANAGEMENT/". If NULL, section 5 is written as (None).

irrigation_path

Path to irrigation management file directory. Default: "MANAGEMENT/". If NULL, section 4 is written as (None).

soil_path

Path to soil file directory. Required, cannot be NULL. Default: "SOIL/".

groundwater_path

Path to groundwater table file directory. Default: NULL. If NULL, section 7 is written as (None).

offseason_path

Path to off-season conditions file directory. Default: NULL. If NULL, section 9 is written as (None).

obs_path

Path to field data file directory. Default: NULL. If NULL, section 10 is written as (None).

simulation_start_doy

Day of year for simulation start. If NULL (default), uses April 1st (DOY 91, or 92 for leap years).

scenario

Climate scenario. One of: "hist", "rcp26", "rcp45", "rcp60", "rcp85", "ssp119", "ssp126", "ssp245", "ssp370", "ssp585". Default: "hist".

eol

End-of-line character style. One of "windows", "linux", "macos". Default: "windows".

use_standalone

Logical. Whether running AquaCrop in standalone mode. Default: TRUE.

base_path

Character. Base absolute path used for file existence checking. Default: getwd().

Value

Invisibly returns the output file path.

See also

Other AquaCrop file writers: write_cal(), write_cli(), write_cro(), write_eto(), write_gwt(), write_irr(), write_man(), write_obs(), write_off(), write_plu(), write_swo(), write_tnx()
